Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lysander]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Lysander is an Overlord who wears scholarly spectacles and a feathered buckskin outfit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Lysander has golden hair and chiseled features.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Lysander has a realm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Lysander has been planning against King Zakareth for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Lysander is an Overlord who has given his allegiance to Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Lysander is an Avernus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — Lysander is a scholarly-looking man in soft buckskin decorated with feathers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Lysander is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Lysander has a flock of sparrows flying around his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Lysander is described as a scholarly man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Lysander can produce a psychic scream from his hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Lysander was involved in an ambush.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Lysander is an Overlord who was encased in a solid, translucent coffin of milky white crystal.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Lysander is Feiora's brother and an Avernus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Lysander was the premier Sarin-tribe Avernus Traveler in the nation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Feiora previously attempted to rally other Overlords to force the release of Lysander.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
